settings.layout_help: Tiles — cards with icon and label. Pills — compact inline items
settings.pill_shape_help: Capsule — fully rounded edges. Rectangle — closer to the standard Flarum style
settings.columns_desktop_help: From 2 to 6 per row on desktop. Mobile uses the standard Flarum navigation
settings.plain_create_button: Remove fill from the «New Discussion» button
settings.plain_create_button_help: Make it visually identical to the neighbouring items — no colored background
